content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative unsupervised refinement pipeline as the core procedural "engine" for implementing multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each round of self-feedback in Self-Refine is leveraged to generate a new inconsistent solving perspective. This creates a recursive self-improvement loop that eliminates the need for both external supervision and manually constructed multiple perspectives that most existing multi-perspective reflection methods rely on.
